ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Rauch for Jean Ng (Administrator).

Mr. Rauch stated that he finished the petition for final distribution, that he is waiting for a signature on the verification, that he expects to have it any day and that he will file it. Status on close of estate is continued to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Rauch for and with Jean Ng (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue of defect in notice to Jimmy Fong and questions whether it should waive this. Mr. Rauch stated that Ms. Ng personally served her Brother with the petition to administer the estate, that the Brother does not have a typical address and that she met somewhere at a place she knew he would be. The Court noted that service is to be done by a non-party. Mr. Rauch made reference to CCP 413.30 and stated that it is appropriate to proceed under the circumstances. The Court stated that it knows Mr. Fong received notice because he participated in waiver of bond. The Court granted the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration (order signed in open Court). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for May 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
